name: Rhubarb Raisin Crumble
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine ingredients in a heatproof pan, such as a 13x8x2 inch baking dish.
2. The combined ingredients will seem dry at first; don't be concerned as the rhubarb will release liquid during cooking.
3. Place the pan in a cold oven and set the temperature to 375°F (190°C).
4. Bake uncovered for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Continue baking until the rhubarb is tender but still firm, about 10 to 15 more minutes.
6. Add maple syrup to taste if additional sweetness is desired.
Trim and cut rhubarb into 1-inch slices
Fruit-sweetened; finely minced or grated if possible
++ Preferably homemade granola with a mix of nuts, such as maple walnut
